title: AfkChat
description: This inform players in chat who's is afk
body: Inform players in chat who's afk and inform players who's not any longer afk. # Commands /afkreload reloads the config.yml # Default Config ![DEFAULT CONFIG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7feadb7f06dfb1ce50590c6ad96f289a17f914.png) Leave the broadcast to true if u want to inform players if u are afk or when u are back. Edit if u know what u are doing.
